## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy and content improvements for Dimmo's website.](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Immediate focus on optimizing meta titles/descriptions for high-impression, low-click pages](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [New content strategy combining thought leadership and ultra-long-tail keywords for blog](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Improve discoverability and user experience for product review pages](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [GrowthX team to proceed with content creation without requiring approval for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance

  - [Mismatch between impressions and clicks observed across clients](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [AI overviews potentially reducing click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Some pages (e.g., Titan X, FlashDocs AI) driving clicks despite low overall performance](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)

### Short-term Optimization Strategy

  - [Target top 10 pages with highest impressions](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Finesse meta titles and descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Monitor click improvements over next few weeks/month](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Enhance interlinking, especially for well-performing pages (e.g., FlashDocs AI)](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Suggest related tools to visitors, creating a portfolio approach](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Previous focus on product pages over blog content](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [GrowthX suggests reintroducing blog for thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Aim: Improve domain authority and educate on broader software categories](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Troy's concern: Blog traffic not converting to product page visits](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Proposed solution: Optimize blog-to-product page funneling with strategic CTAs and pop-ups](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

### Long-tail Keyword Opportunities

  - [Target ultra-specific, question-based searches](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Identified keywords with manageable difficulty and good search volume](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic content creation (e.g., "best \[category\] software")](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

### Website UX Improvements

  - [Better clustering and searchability for software categories](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Potential for AI chatbot integration for personalized recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Upcoming feature: AI-powered search for specific tool features within demo videos](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

### Content Workflow

  - [GrowthX team to publish content without requiring Troy's approval](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Will seek approval only when necessary](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Troy to share email updates on new demo video creations](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Begin optimizing meta titles/descriptions for top-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Start new content strategy with thought leadership and long-tail keyword focus](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Explore UX improvements for better product discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide meeting recap and detailed next steps](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Implement workflow for sharing new demo video information](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Continue regular updates on progress and performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/cQyEZFZ9sxGNJP2Fy-aszQevicrBg3sB?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
